input.parameters_schema_json: [{"name": "url", "type": "string", "label": "URL", "control_type": "url", "optional": false, "hint": "The URL to encode in the QR code"}, {"name": "fg_color", "type": "string", "label": "Foreground color", "control_type": "text", "optional": true, "hint": "Color of QR modules and logo. Named presets: workato (#108291), dark, black, white. Or any hex value like #ff6600. Default: workato"}, {"name": "bg_color", "type": "string", "label": "Background color", "control_type": "text", "optional": true, "hint": "Background color. Presets: white, transparent. Or any hex value. Default: white"}]

block.name: invoke_custom_py_code
block.comment: Generate QR code via api.qrserver.com, return base64 PNG
